entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1406) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD 2 GBPS AND 5 GBPS NETWORK BASED IP-VPN (NBIP-VPN) ETHERNET PORT PRICING IN GERMANY AT THE REQUEST OF DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO) ON BEHALF OF THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE DEPENDENT SCHOOLS (DODDS) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2106.01E. 2. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING TO SUPPORT 50 MBPS FAST ETHERNET ACCESS IN MACON, GA FOR DITCO ON BEHALF OF THE ARMY NATIONAL GUARD (ARNG) AND FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2118.02E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1407) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD DDOS SHIELD, A NEW SERVICE UNDER THE INTRUSION DETECTION AND PREVENTION SERVICE (IDPS) PLATFORM FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2119.03E. 2. TO ADD 100 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS AT SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC) SLRKPAXS IN SLIPPERY ROCK, PA, FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2124.01E. 3. TO ADD 30 MB ETHERNET ACCESS IN OAK HARBOR, WA, (SWC OKHRWAXX) AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO) - DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2128.01E. 4. TO ADD 20 MB ETHERNET ACCESS IN EVERETT, WA, (SWC EVRTWAXF) AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO) - DEPARTMENT OF THE NAVY, FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2129.01E. 5. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING WITHOUT AN SWC FOR 20MB ETHERNET ACCESS IN PINEVILLE, WV, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR (DOL) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2132.01E. 6. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 50 MBPS AND 100 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN OWEGO, NY AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE (DOD), DEFENSE CONTRACT AUDIT AGENCY (DCAA) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2136.01E. 7. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 50MB AND 100MB ETHERNET ACCESS IN OZARK, AL, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE CONTRACT AUDIT AGENCY (DCAA) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2137.01E. 8. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 50MB AND 100MB ETHERNET ACCESS IN FORT WALTON BEACH, FL, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE CONTRACT AUDIT AGENCY (DCAA) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2138.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1408) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 20 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN MORGANTOWN, WV, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY (DOE) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2135.01E. 2. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING TO SUPPORT 50 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN WASILLA, AK AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY NATIONAL GUARD (USANG) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2140.01E. 3. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICES TO SUPPORT MULTIPLE SPEEDS IN MULTIPLE LOCATIONS AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY NATIONAL GUARD (USANG) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2142.01E. 4. TO ADD SWC ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING AT MARYSVILLE, WA AND SPARTA WI, ALONG WITH SDP ETHERNET ACCESS PRICING IN MARYSVILLE, WA AT THE REQUEST OF THE UNITED STATES ARMY RESERVE COMMAND (USARC), FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2147.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1409) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD 4 KHZ SUB DS0 ANALOG IN YOUNGSVILLE, LA (SWC YNVLLAAK) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2115.01E. 2. TO REDUCE THE INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE RATES FOR THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION - U.S. ARMY RESERVE COMMAND (DITCO-USARC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2117.01P. 3. TO ADD TEN (10) RIVERBED SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES (SEDS) FOR NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK (NBIPVPN) SERVICES IN SUPPORT OF ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2131.01E. 4. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING TO SUPPORT 10 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN SCRANTON, PA AT THE REQUEST OF DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY (USA) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2141.01E. 5. TO ADD 50MB NON-DOM FIRM FIXED ACCESS&NBIPVPN PORT IN CAPODICHINO, ITALY, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF DEFENSE DEPENDENTS SCHOOLS (DODDS) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2143.01E. 6. TO REDUCE SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC) RATE FOR 10, 20, 50, AND 100 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN MOUNT VERNON, IN, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY (DOE) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2144.01P. 7. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES (MNS) FEATURE PRICING FOR A MANAGED WIRELESS SOLUTION, AT THE REQUEST OF DITCO UNITED STATES ARMY RESERVE COMMAND (USARC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2146.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1410) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD SITE SURVEY SERVICES IN SIX AIR FORCE BASES, AT THE REQUEST OF DITCO-U.S. AIR FORCE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2148.01E. 2. TO REDUCE SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC) PRICING FOR 1 GBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN FOLSOM, CA (SWC FLSMCA12) AND PHOENIX, AZ (SWC PHNZAZWE) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2155.01P. 3. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 100 MBPS OF ETHERNET ACCESS IN PUERTO RICO AND HAWAII, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY NATIONAL GUARD (USANG), FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2157.01E. 4. TO ADD 100MB NON-DOM FIRM FIXED ACCESS PRICING IN KAISERSLAUTERN, GERMANY, AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY RESERVE COMMAND (USARC) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2158.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1411) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING SERVICES:
1. TO ADD SIXTY-SIX (66) VIPTELA SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES (SEDS) FOR MANAGED NETWORK SERVICES (MNS) IN SUPPORT OF ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2133.01E.
2. TO ADD THREE (3) CISCO SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES (SEDS) FOR INTERNET PROTOCOL TELEPHONY SERVICE (IPTELS) IN SUPPORT OF ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2145.01E.
3. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING TO SUPPORT 200 MBPS AND 1 GBPS (1000 MBPS) ETHERNET ACCESS IN OAK RIDGE, TN AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEPARTMENT OF ENERGY (DOE) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2162.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1412) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD AN INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB), CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (CAA) TO PROVIDE 2 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS AT THE CHINHAE, NAVAL AIR STATION IN SOUTH KOREA FOR THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), DEFENSE COMMISSARY AGENCY (DECA), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2139.01E.
2. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING TO SUPPORT 500 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN EDINBURGH, IN FOR THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), UNITED STATES ARMY (USA) AND ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2151.01E.
3. TO ADD ONE (1) CISCO SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SED) TO THE MCI NETWORX CONTRACT. THE DEVICE IDENTIFIED IN SECTION 6, TABLE 6.1 AND IS ASSOCIATED WITH NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE (NBIPVPNS) IN SUPPORT OF ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2153.01E.
4. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION RATES FOR 200 MBPS AND 300 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN BOWLING GREEN, VA FOR THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO) - ARMY AND ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2159.01E.
5. TO ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB), CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT (CAA) TO SUPPORT INTEGRATED SERVICES DIGITAL NETWORK (ISDN) PRIMARY RATE INTERFACE (PRI) IN FORT BUCHANAN, PR (NSC: FTBCPRAH) FOR DITCO-ARMY, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2166.01E.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0038 (PS1413) awarded to MCI COMMUNICATIONS SERVICES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: ITS/ NETWRK SVCS CONTRACT OPNS DIV1

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
TO ADD THE FOLLOWING TELECOMMUNICATION SERVICES:
1. TO ADD THREE (3) VISUAL SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES (SEDS) IN ASSOCIATED WITH MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE (MNS), NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE (NBIPVPNS), INTERNET PROTOCOL SERVICE (IPS), AND VOICE OVER INTERNET PROTOCOL TRANSPORT SERVICE (VOIPTS) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2152.02E.
2. TO ADD SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 50 MBPS OF ETHERNET ACCESS IN HOUSTON, TX AT THE REQUEST OF THE DEFENSE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CONTRACTING ORGANIZATION (DITCO), US ARMY FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2156.01E.
3. TO REDUCE SDP EXCEPTION PRICING FOR 1 GBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN FORT KNOX, KY AND 10 MBPS ETHERNET ACCESS IN JACKSONVILLE, FL FOR DITCO U.S. ARMY HUMAN RESOURCE COMMAND (USAHRC) FOR ALL AGENCIES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL ME2161.01P.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
